entries.title: Workflow .github/workflows/ci.yml
entries.body: Only gate on main/staging pushes that will trigger a deploy.

entries.title: Workflow .github/workflows/dependency-health.yml
entries.body: Checks status pages for third-party services Starting Monday depends on.

entries.title: Workflow .github/workflows/fast-burn-alert.yml
entries.body: Runs offset from monitoring.yml (which runs at */30) to avoid double-alerts.

entries.title: Workflow .github/workflows/monitoring-watchdog.yml
entries.body: Synthetics runs every 5 minutes, but GitHub scheduled workflows can drift significantly during incidents.

entries.title: Workflow .github/workflows/post-deploy.yml
entries.body: Triggered by Railway deployment events via GitHub deployment_status webhook.

entries.title: Workflow .github/workflows/pr-autofix.yml
entries.body: Guide sync can be run proactively, no strict failed-check name requirement.

entries.title: Workflow .github/workflows/production-synthetics.yml
entries.body: Runs all 8 synthetic checks against production every 5 minutes.
